offence: Damage to a computer or computer system (unauthorised access, downloading data, introducing a virus, or denial of service)
punishment: Liable to pay compensation to the affected person.
Imprisonment up to 3 years and/or fine up to Rs. 2,00,000.

offence: Computer-related offences (dishonestly or fraudulently doing any act referred to in section 43)
punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 years and/or fine up to Rs. 5,00,000.

offence: Dishonestly receiving a stolen computer resource or communication device
punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 years and/or fine up to Rs. 1,00,000.

offence: Identity theft (fraudulent or dishonest use of another person's password, electronic signature or other unique identification)
punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 years and fine up to Rs. 1,00,000.

offence: Cheating by personation by using a computer resource
punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 years and fine up to Rs. 1,00,000.

offence: Violation of privacy (capturing, publishing or transmitting the private image of a person without consent)
punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 years and/or fine up to Rs. 2,00,000.
Imprisonment which may extend to imprisonment for life.

offence: Publishing or transmitting obscene material in electronic form
punishment: First conviction: imprisonment up to 3 years and fine up to Rs. 5,00,000; subsequent: imprisonment up to 5 years and fine up to Rs. 10,00,000.

offence: Publishing or transmitting material containing sexually explicit acts in electronic form
punishment: First conviction: imprisonment up to 5 years and fine up to Rs. 10,00,000; subsequent: imprisonment up to 7 years and fine up to Rs. 10,00,000.

offence: Publishing or transmitting material depicting children in sexually explicit acts
punishment: First conviction: imprisonment up to 5 years and fine up to Rs. 10,00,000; subsequent: imprisonment up to 7 years and fine up to Rs. 10,00,000.
Imprisonment up to 2 years and/or fine up to Rs. 1,00,000.
